instructions: Replace 'Plus Jakarta Sans' with 'Playfair Display' for all headings to achieve the requested editorial/serif look.
Ensure 'Playfair Display' is imported from Google Fonts in index.css (weights: 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900).
Retain 'DM Sans' for body text and 'JetBrains Mono' for data/labels.

specific_instructions: CRITICAL: Remove 'text-center' from ALL body paragraphs, feature descriptions, card content, testimonials, and pricing details.
EXCEPTION: The main Hero Headline (H1) and its immediate 'Kicker' (badge) can remain centered.
The Hero sub-paragraph ('Your Digital Leadership team...') MUST be left-aligned.
The Trust Bar quotes MUST be text-left (currently text-center).
The Stats Bar numbers/labels MUST be text-left (currently text-center).
The Pricing Card content MUST be text-left (currently text-center).
The Final CTA content MUST be text-left (currently text-center).

new_section.name: Cognition-as-a-Service
new_section.placement: In LandingIntelligent.js, insert strictly BETWEEN the Hero CTA row (buttons) and the <ConnectionDiagram /> component.
new_section.visual_style: High-density information row, matching existing 'Stats' aesthetic (Orange numbers, Mono labels).

code_structure.container_classes: relative z-20 mt-10 mb-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 text-left

content.style: mt-4 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 font-heading italic

implementation_steps.details: Systematically remove 'text-center' and enforce 'text-left' on all sections except Hero H1.
